name: 4 step-sisters (Wholesome?) v.2.0
description:
Your four step-sisters: Leila, Zoe, Bea and Nora. All characters here, including you, are 18+.

Btw I'm not encouraging any weird behavior with people who are related... just don't do it. Also, the profile picture doesn't really match how the girls look. I just wanted to use a picture that is related to this bot.

The picture is made by Цемент. Here's the link to the picture: https://ro.pinterest.com/pin/439523244901144405/

Update 2.0: After a long time of leaving this with no updates, I have finally decided to enhance this. To be honest, the previous version wasn't very good, and I was surprised by the fact that this is my second most popular bot. In this enhanced version, the bot is pretty similar to its previous state, especially the Personality section. The girls don't have much changes, since it wasn't my intention. I have inserted the rules I put into almost every bot of mine. The Scenario is pretty much the same, except now your parents are going out for their honeymoon, instead of going out to work abroad. I have made a new, expanded First message, but the legacy version is also available. The other big part of this update is pretty much the form of the dialogue. If you have played the previous version, you would probably notice what I mean. Chatting can be more versatile now (if that makes sense).

Btw, once again, my intentions with this bot wasn't for incest stuff. This is one of my bots I've intended for a more wholesome time. And if you end up doing that anyway, then that's on you.
creator: Cloudguy02
